strategy: Team fight at 18,075 Health. Hit Death, +30%, and never Life, which he resists 69%.
Any damage from Round 3 on makes the Bard slap a Spirit Armor absorb (up to 600) on his side. Do not chip. Set up fully and land one hit big enough to blow through the absorb and kill.
Avoid damage-over-time and multi-Round chipping. Each tick just triggers another absorb.
Bring an infection or Doom and Gloom for his Round-5 Regenerate, and expect Gnomes! every third Round.
Funnel blades and Feint to one hitter for a single overwhelming Death hit.
cheatNotes: From Round 3 on, every time anyone takes damage the Bard casts a Spirit Armor absorb on his side, so chip damage just builds him shields.
His biggest version is a 600-damage absorb ward, so hit through it in one big blow rather than tapping.
Every third Round he cheat-casts Gnomes! at the team.
Every fifth Round he Regenerates, so bring an infection or Doom and Gloom to cut the heal.
